channel.title: remote-shell on Sayak B
channel.description: Recent content in remote-shell on Sayak B

item.title: ShellBot
item.description: ShellBot An advanced reverse shell written in Python3. ShellBot is a cross-platform Remote Shell Suite where the Server can be managed by 1 Controller at a time. A server can accept several clients at once, and relay a chosen client’s shell to the controller. This makes it easy for an SysAdmin to manage several computers with minimal setup in an internal network. The ShellBot suite is designed in such a way that it will not stop till a connection is achieved.
